Off Calendar May-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PERRY'S DOWNTON, INC.'S Motion for Order Requiring A $10,855 Undertaking by Plaintiff Paula Lipkin. Appearances: Martin Glickfeld, Esq., Law Offices of Martin Glickfeld, (415) 648-3892, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; John A. Toal, Esq. of Lewis, Brisbois, Bisgaard & Smith LLP, (415) 362-2580, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied. Insufficient evidence of reasonable possibility that defendant will obtain a judgment in its favor. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
